prompt:
A handwritten tally board showing grouped marks, directional arrows, and brightness classes for meteors seen across a night. A red flashlight and simple star chart nearby make it clearly a meteor-watch record that separates real meteors from false positives.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with low soft lighting, realistic paper and pen textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the tally page centered and uncluttered.
